_note: Two `.svelte` imports on ONE source line, second missing (`./B.svelte`). No `svelte` install here, so no `*.svelte` wildcard: tsgo reports the 2307 itself, but the overlay line-map collapses the second statement's column onto the first's — while our native TSGO-ENHANCEMENT check maps to the true opening quote. A (path,line,column) dedup key would miss that mismatch and double-report; keying on (path,line,message) pins the module and collapses to the single expected error. Regression lock for the dedup-key fix.
